spouse.name: Henry V Count Palatine of the Rhine

zh.lifeSummary: Agnes of Hohenstaufen於1177年出生。她和Henry V Count Palatine of the Rhine至少有1個女兒。她去世於1204年享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes of Hohenstaufen于1177年出生。她和Henry V Count Palatine of the Rhine至少有1个女儿。她去世于1204年享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes of Hohenstaufen was born in 1177. She had at least 1 daughter with Henry V Count Palatine of the Rhine. She died in 1204, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes of Hohenstaufen est née en 1177. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Henry V Count Palatine of the Rhine. Elle est décédée en 1204, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes of Hohenstaufen wurde 1177 geboren. Sie hatte mit Henry V Count Palatine of the Rhine mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1204 im Alter von 27 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes of Hohenstaufen è nata il nel 1177. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Henry V Count Palatine of the Rhine. Morì nel 1204, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes of Hohenstaufenは1177年に生まれた。彼女はHenry V Count Palatine of the Rhineとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1204年に27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes of Hohenstaufen(은)는 1177년 태어났다. 그녀는 Henry V Count Palatine of the Rhine(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1204년 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes of Hohenstaufen nasceu em 1177. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Henry V Count Palatine of the Rhine. Ela faleceu em 1204, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes of Hohenstaufen родилась в 1177 г. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Henry V Count Palatine of the Rhine. Она умерла в 1204 г. в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes of Hohenstaufen nació en 1177. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Henry V Count Palatine of the Rhine. Murió en 1204, a la edad de 27 años.
